programme.title: Megatransporty 2
programme.desc: The team from Zamość undertakes to transport wind farms.The eight large-sized elements of each windmill are placed on a total of 17 sets.The route, which is over 1,200 km long, leads from Meyn in Germany to Jabłonowo Pomorski.Meanwhile, the company from Opole, in which the driver "Makuwa" works, undertakes the transport of a hundred-ton press for stamping metal elements.The team has to cover 220 km from the port of Świnoujście to Widzin, Kashubia.The third team is a company from Zabrze, waiting to load a huge forklift.The device can lift up to 45 tons.The cargo is to be delivered to the Czech town of Melnik near Prague.

programme.title: HMS Ark Royal
programme.desc: The creators of the series look at the ship HMS Ark Royal, which is taking part in a special mission.For 5 months he will lead an international group during naval maneuvers in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Cornwall Air 999
programme.desc: Paramedics save the lives of many people every day.They take part in dangerous interventions and go wherever someone needs their help.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy made his fortune scrapping cars.He is assisted by his father Bobby and a team of eccentric associates.They renovate machines that previous owners threw into the trash.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programme.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programme.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches 2
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches 2
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: You will be pleased 3
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit car workshops with a camera to observe the work of mechanics.Krzysztof Woroniecki will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: You will be pleased 3
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit car workshops with a camera to observe the work of mechanics.Krzysztof Woroniecki will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 3
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old, classic cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore the damaged machine.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 3
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old, classic cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore the damaged machine.

programme.title: Misfit Garage
programme.desc: Former employees of Richard Rawlings open their own workshop.First, they must develop a good reputation to attract customers and be able to become a real replacement for their former employer.

programme.title: Road absurdities 10
programme.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski track down examples of solutions that make life difficult for drivers, including:indicate incorrectly positioned characters.

programme.title: Road absurdities 10
programme.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski track down examples of solutions that make life difficult for drivers, including:indicate incorrectly positioned characters.

programme.title: Steel Buddies 5
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: Three eccentric mechanics, Jimmy de Ville, Ant Partridge and Helen Stanley, decide to reactivate the once great British engineering company, Goblin.Together they restore the most famous cars and motorcycles in the world.The designs they create are characterized not only by a unique appearance, but also by above-average performance and attention to every detail.This season, the trio faces the difficult challenge of starting and promoting their new business.Their goal is to attract new customers and create unique machines.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: Three eccentric mechanics, Jimmy de Ville, Ant Partridge and Helen Stanley, decide to reactivate the once great British engineering company, Goblin.Together they restore the most famous cars and motorcycles in the world.The designs they create are characterized not only by a unique appearance, but also by above-average performance and attention to every detail.This season, the trio faces the difficult challenge of starting and promoting their new business.Their goal is to attract new customers and create unique machines.

programme.title: Megatransporty 2
programme.desc: The convoy with the first windmill is waiting in a parking lot near Hamburg for sets carrying the second windmill.Routine inspections take place at night.German police say there is no registration certificate.The team must also additionally secure the load supports.A team from Opole, transporting a hundred-ton baler from Świnoujście to Kashubia, has trouble passing through the gate.Further travel is made difficult by the nearly 6-meter-wide load and the damaged tarpaulin.Meanwhile, the team from Zabrze, transporting a large forklift, is getting ready to hit the road after an all-day stop.The team must cover another 620 kilometers in just two nights.

programme.title: HMS Ark Royal
programme.desc: The creators of the series look at the ship HMS Ark Royal, which is taking part in a special mission.For 5 months he will lead an international group during naval maneuvers in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Cornwall Air 999
programme.desc: Paramedics save the lives of many people every day.They take part in dangerous interventions and go wherever someone needs their help.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.
